framework.name: KL Municipal Information Security Guidance
framework.scope: Information security guidance for Danish municipalities covering ISMS, citizen data, employee security, and IT operations
framework.structure_description: Guidance organized by domains: ISMS, citizen data protection, employee security, IT operations, and NIS2 compliance.

controls.title: Municipal ISMS based on ISO 27001
controls.description: Municipalities must establish an information security management system (ISMS) based on ISO 27001 with active management engagement.
controls.description_nl: Kommuner skal etablere et ledelsessystem for informationssikkerhed (ISMS) baseret pa ISO 27001 med ledelsens aktive engagement.
controls.implementation_guidance: Foelg KLs implementeringsvejledning for kommunalt ISMS. Start med ledelsens commitment og scope-definition.

controls.title: Municipal risk assessment
controls.description: The municipality must conduct regular risk assessment of all IT systems with particular focus on citizen data and critical welfare systems.
controls.description_nl: Kommunen skal gennemfoere regelmaeessig risikovurdering af alle IT-systemer med saerligt fokus pa borgerdata og kritiske velfaerdssystemer.

controls.title: Municipal information security policy
controls.description: The municipal council must approve an information security policy that establishes the framework for the municipality information security.
controls.description_nl: Kommunalbestyrelsen skal godkende en informationssikkerhedspolitik der fastlaegger rammer for kommunens informationssikkerhed.

controls.title: Protection of citizen information
controls.description: The municipality must ensure citizen information is protected with appropriate technical and organizational measures in accordance with GDPR.
controls.description_nl: Kommunen skal sikre at borgeroplysninger beskyttes med passende tekniske og organisatoriske foranstaltninger i henhold til GDPR.

controls.title: Classification of municipal data
controls.description: Municipal data must be classified into categories (public, internal, confidential, sensitive) with defined handling requirements for each category.
controls.description_nl: Kommunale data skal klassificeres i kategorier (offentlig, intern, fortrolig, folsom) med definerede handteringskrav for hver kategori.

controls.title: Access control to citizen systems
controls.description: Access to systems with citizen data must be managed with role-based access control and regular review of access rights.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til systemer med borgerdata skal styres med rollebaseret adgangskontrol og regelmaessig review af adgangsrettigheder.

controls.title: Information security training for municipal staff
controls.description: All municipal employees must complete annual information security training focusing on phishing, data handling, and reporting.
controls.description_nl: Alle kommunale medarbejdere skal gennemfoere arlig informationssikkerhedstraening med fokus pa phishing, datahaandtering og rapportering.

controls.title: Special training for IT staff
controls.description: The municipality IT staff must receive specialized security training relevant to their technical areas of responsibility.
controls.description_nl: Kommunens IT-personale skal modtage specialiseret sikkerhedstraening relevant for deres tekniske ansvarsomraader.

controls.title: Security for remote work in municipalities
controls.description: Municipal staff working from home must comply with security requirements for remote access including VPN and device security.
controls.description_nl: Kommunalt personale der arbejder hjemmefra skal overholde sikkerhedskrav for fjernadgang inklusiv VPN og enhedssikkerhed.

controls.title: Patch management in municipalities
controls.description: The municipality must have a documented process for patch management with prioritization based on vulnerability severity and system criticality.
controls.description_nl: Kommunen skal have en dokumenteret proces for patchstyring med prioritering baseret pa sarbarheders alvorsgrad og systemkritikalitet.

controls.title: Backup of municipal systems
controls.description: Critical municipal systems and data must be regularly backed up with recovery testing at least semi-annually.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske kommunale systemer og data skal sikkerhedskopieres regelmaessigt med test af gendannelse mindst halvaarligt.

controls.title: Municipal incident handling
controls.description: The municipality must have an incident handling process with clear roles, escalation, and communication plans for IT security incidents.
controls.description_nl: Kommunen skal have en haendelseshaandteringsproces med klare roller, eskalering og kommunikationsplaner for IT-sikkerhedshaendelser.

controls.title: Municipal IT vendor management
controls.description: The municipality must impose security requirements on IT vendors and conduct regular verification of vendor compliance.
controls.description_nl: Kommunen skal stille sikkerhedskrav til IT-leverandoerer og gennemfoere regelmaessig kontrol af leverandoerens overholdelse.

controls.title: Municipal NIS2 assessment
controls.description: Municipalities must assess whether they are covered by NIS2 as an essential or important entity and implement the required measures.
controls.description_nl: Kommuner skal vurdere om de er omfattet af NIS2 som vasentlig eller vigtig enhed og implementere de paakraevede foranstaltninger.
controls.implementation_guidance: KL udarbejder vejledning om NIS2-compliance for kommuner. Vurder om kritisk infrastruktur (vand, varme) er omfattet.
